components.text: Fasting Pills are a sustainable alternative to food. Very popular among cultivators who still require sustenance.

Fasting Pills are some of the most popular pills for budding cultivators! 
Until you obtain a level of power that allows you to sustain your self with Qi alone, Fasting Pills are the best food option. 

 Fasting Pills come in 3 different Tiers. Each with their own Saturation and Saturation Modifier!
